The '''First Pii asteroid belt''' was the first of two [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belts]] in the [[Pii system/Legends|Pii system]]. It was located between the second and third [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbits]].
